heading: Assuring consistent oversight of subsidiaries of holding companies
label: 1831c Assuring consistent oversight of subsidiaries of holding companies

children.heading: Board
children.label: 1 Board
children.text: The term “Board” means the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System.

children.heading: Functionally regulated subsidiary
children.label: 2 Functionally regulated subsidiary
children.text: The term “functionally regulated subsidiary” has the same meaning as in section 1844(c)(5) of this title.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Lead insured depository institution
children.label: 3 Lead insured depository institution
children.text: The term “lead insured depository institution” has the same meaning as in section 1841()(8) of this title.o1

children.heading: Examination requirements
children.label: b Examination requirements
children.text: Subject to subtitle B of the Consumer Financial Protection Act of 2010 [ et seq.], the Board shall examine the activities of a nondepository institution subsidiary (other than a functionally regulated subsidiary or a subsidiary of a depository institution) of a depository institution holding company that are permissible for the insured depository institution subsidiaries of the depository institution holding company in the same manner, subject to the same standards, and with the same frequency as would be required if such activities were conducted in the lead insured depository institution of the depository institution holding company.12 U.S.C. 5511

children.heading: Consultation and coordination
children.label: 1 Consultation and coordination
children.text: If a nondepository institution subsidiary is supervised by a State bank supervisor or other State regulatory authority, the Board, in conducting the examinations required in subsection (b), shall consult and coordinate with such State regulator.

children.heading: Alternating examinations permitted
children.label: 2 Alternating examinations permitted
children.text: The examinations required under subsection (b) may be conducted in joint or alternating manner with a State regulator, if the Board determines that an examination of a nondepository institution subsidiary conducted by the State carries out the purposes of this section.

children.heading: Appropriate Federal banking agency backup examination authority
children.label: d Appropriate Federal banking agency backup examination authority

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: In the event that the Board does not conduct examinations required under subsection (b) in the same manner, subject to the same standards, and with the same frequency as would be required if such activities were conducted by the lead insured depository institution subsidiary of the depository institution holding company, the appropriate Federal banking agency for the lead insured depository institution may recommend in writing (which shall include a written explanation of the concerns giving rise to the recommendation) that the Board perform the examination required under subsection (b).

children.heading: Examination by an appropriate Federal banking agency
children.label: 2 Examination by an appropriate Federal banking agency
A
children.text: pose a material threat to the safety and soundness of any insured depository institution subsidiary of the depository institution holding company;

children.label: B
children.text: are conducted in accordance with applicable Federal law; and

children.label: C
children.text: are subject to appropriate systems for monitoring and controlling the financial, operating, and other material risks of the activities that may pose a material threat to the safety and soundness of the insured depository institution subsidiaries of the holding company.

children.label: A
children.text: avoids duplication;

children.label: B
children.text: shares information relevant to the supervision of the depository institution holding company;

children.label: C
children.text: achieves the objectives of subsection (b); and

children.label: D
children.text: ensures that the depository institution holding company and the subsidiaries of the depository institution holding company are not subject to conflicting supervisory demands by such agency and the Board.

children.heading: Fee permitted for examination costs
children.label: 4 Fee permitted for examination costs
children.text: An appropriate Federal banking agency that conducts an examination or enforcement action pursuant to this section may collect an assessment, fee, or such other charge from the subsidiary as the appropriate Federal banking agency determines necessary or appropriate to carry out the responsibilities of the appropriate Federal banking agency in connection with such examination.

children.heading: Referrals for enforcement by appropriate Federal banking agency
children.label: e Referrals for enforcement by appropriate Federal banking agency

children.heading: Recommendation of enforcement action
children.label: 1 Recommendation of enforcement action
children.text: The appropriate Federal banking agency for the lead insured depository institution, based upon its examination of a nondepository institution subsidiary conducted pursuant to subsection (d), or other relevant information, may submit to the Board, in writing, a recommendation that the Board take enforcement action against such nondepository institution subsidiary, together with an explanation of the concerns giving rise to the recommendation, if the appropriate Federal banking agency determines (by a vote of its members, if applicable) that the activities of the nondepository institution subsidiary pose a material threat to the safety and soundness of any insured depository institution subsidiary of the depository institution holding company.

children.heading: Back-up authority of the appropriate Federal banking agency
children.label: 2 Back-up authority of the appropriate Federal banking agency
children.text: If, within the 60-day period beginning on the date on which the Board receives a recommendation under paragraph (1), the Board does not take enforcement action against the nondepository institution subsidiary or provide a plan for supervisory or enforcement action that is acceptable to the appropriate Federal banking agency that made the recommendation pursuant to paragraph (1), such agency may take the recommended enforcement action against the nondepository institution subsidiary, in the same manner as if the nondepository institution subsidiary were an insured depository institution for which the agency was the appropriate Federal banking agency.

children.heading: Coordination among appropriate Federal banking agencies
children.label: f Coordination among appropriate Federal banking agencies

children.text: provide reasonable notice to, and consult with, the appropriate Federal banking agency or State bank supervisor (or other State regulatory agency) of the nondepository institution subsidiary of a depository institution holding company that is described in subsection (d) before commencing any examination of the subsidiary;

children.label: A
children.text: rely on the examinations, inspections, and reports of the appropriate Federal banking agency or the State bank supervisor (or other State regulatory agency) of the subsidiary;

children.label: B
children.text: avoid duplication of examination activities, reporting requirements, and requests for information; and

children.label: C
children.text: ensure that the depository institution holding company and the subsidiaries of the depository institution holding company are not subject to conflicting supervisory demands by the appropriate Federal banking agencies.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: g Rule of construction
children.text: No provision of this section shall be construed as limiting any authority of the Board, the Corporation, or the Comptroller of the Currency under any other provision of law.
